headline: Production-grade real-time fraud detection platform processing 100+ transactions/sec end-to-end
highlights: 100+ TPS ingestion through Kafka with Avro schema enforcement
Sub-10s latency from transaction event to Delta Lake Bronze
Sub-millisecond fraud scoring via Redis feature store + FastAPI
AUC-gated ML model promotion with full MLflow audit trail
Zero-downtime Redis fallback — API never goes down on cache failure
200+ user risk profiles refreshed every 15 minutes via Airflow + dbt
Full observability: Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, Superset BI
